text:
M1046 (M1045) Influenza Vaccine - Received This field indicates the reason why the influenza vaccine was received from the agency during this episode of care. 01 = Yes; received from your agency during this episode of care (SOC/ROC to Transfer/Discharge)
02 = Yes; received from your agency during a prior episode of care (SOC/ROC to Transfer/Discharge)
03 = Yes; received from another health care provider (for example, physician, pharmacist)
04 = No; patient offered and declined
05 = No; patient
